faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Mount Pleasant?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Mount Pleasant take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and the number of affected drains. Our technicians will inspect all potential breeding sites, treat affected areas with specialized solutions, and provide recommendations to prevent future issues.

faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Mount Pleasant homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in the organic matter that accumulates in drains, sewers, and septic systems. In Mount Pleasant, we often see drain fly problems in older homes with aging plumbing, basement drains, and properties with moisture issues. Poor drain maintenance and standing water create ideal breeding conditions for these pests.

faqs.question: Is your drain fly treatment safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We offer eco-friendly treatment options and always follow strict safety protocols. Most treatments require minimal disruption, and treated areas are safe for normal use shortly after application.
